microwave_time.user_tendencies: IF eating in a social setting AND relaxed with ample time AND foods without sauces THEN 3 min BECAUSE the user prefers hotter food when socializing. IF watching television AND fatigued AND desserts THEN no microwave BECAUSE the user prefers room temperature desserts to minimize effort. IF working on a laptop AND neutral AND meats THEN 2 min BECAUSE the user balances temperature and focus on work. IF eating in a social setting AND fatigued AND fruits THEN no microwave BECAUSE the user prefers cold fruits to minimize effort.

occlusion_relevance.user_tendencies: IF eating while watching television AND neutral AND any food THEN minimize front occlusion BECAUSE the user wants an unobstructed view of the screen. IF eating in a social setting AND relaxed with ample time AND any food THEN minimize left occlusion BECAUSE the user prefers to maintain eye contact with the social partner. IF eating alone AND in a hurry AND any food THEN do not consider occlusion BECAUSE the user prioritizes speed over view. IF eating while working on a laptop AND fatigued AND any food THEN minimize front occlusion BECAUSE the user needs an unobstructed view to maintain focus. IF eating in a social setting AND fatigued AND any food THEN minimize front occlusion BECAUSE the user prioritizes reducing effort over social interaction.
